currentPhase.name: Waxing Crescent
currentPhase.phaseInterpretation: The Waxing Crescent is the time of intention-setting and quiet momentum. Seeds planted at the New Moon are beginning to germinate beneath the surface. Your dreams are finding their roots. Nurture them with patience and deliberate action — do not rush what wants to unfold naturally.
currentPhase.signInterpretation: The Moon in Taurus grounds your emotions in the physical world. Your senses are sharpened — food tastes richer, music moves you more deeply, and the comfort of stability calls. This is an excellent time to plant literal or metaphorical seeds: start the project, open the savings account, plant the garden.

upcomingEvents.description: Decision point energy crests. You'll feel a push to act on what you've been contemplating. A necessary tension between intention and reality — lean into it.
The Full Moon in Virgo illuminates matters of health, service, and daily rhythms. What systems in your life are working? What needs to be refined or released?
A time of release and forgiveness. Let go of beliefs that have outgrown their usefulness. The philosophical Sagittarius energy supports expanding your worldview.
The most spiritual New Moon of the year. Set intentions around compassion, creativity, and spiritual deepening. Your dreams are particularly prophetic now.
Balance, partnership, and beauty come into sharp focus. Relationships reach a turning point — clarity emerges about who and what truly brings harmony to your life.
